/usr/bin/ar qc liblib_idl_stubs.a  CMakeFiles/lib_idl_stubs.dir/generated/idl/DGTC.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_idl_stubs.dir/generated/idl/SKC.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_idl_stubs.dir/generated/idl/CONFIGC.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_idl_stubs.dir/generated/idl/ALARMC.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_idl_stubs.dir/generated/idl/LOGC.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_idl_stubs.dir/generated/idl/MMCommonC.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_idl_stubs.dir/generated/idl/CONFIGManagerC.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_idl_stubs.dir/generated/idl/ALARMManagerC.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_idl_stubs.dir/generated/idl/LOGManagerC.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_idl_stubs.dir/generated/idl/MonitorManagerC.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_idl_stubs.dir/generated/idl/DCFC.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib liblib_idl_stubs.a
